title: McCarthy Middle School hosts Special Olympics Massachusetts Unified Game Day
description: CHELMSFORD — Members of Special Olympics Massachusetts and the Final Leg Law Enforcement Torch Run (LETR) stopped by McCarthy Middle School on June 4 to help kick off Unified Game Day for Chelmsford Public Schools.
